headline: Congress gears up for judicial nominations as both chambers return Monday following brief recess.

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate met briefly in pro forma session on Thursday, July 9, for a quick administrative gathering that lasted just 30 seconds before adjourning for the weekend. No substantive votes or floor action took place.

onTheFloor.title: Consideration of Matthew A. Schwartz nomination to be United States Circuit Judge for the Second Circuit
Confirmation vote on Arthur Roberts Jones nomination to be United States District Judge for the Southern District of Texas

house.lastSessionSummary: The House met briefly on Thursday, July 9, for a three-minute session in which 39 new bills and 3 resolutions were introduced, and six committee reports were filed covering healthcare, travel, homeland security, and aviation security matters. No floor votes took place.

onTheFloor.title: Reauthorize the Accelerating Access to Critical Therapies for ALS Act through fiscal year 2031
Establish the IMPROVE Initiative within the National Institutes of Health
Reorganize and realign the Engagement, Liaison, and Outreach Office of the Department of Homeland Security
Establish funds for investments in aviation security
Assess terrorism threats posed by foreign terrorist organizations in major non-NATO allied countries

committees.topic: Hearing on the Sunshine Protection Act of 2025 (H.R. 139), National Security appropriations, Veterans benefits, and privacy in purchases

committees.committee: Committee on Veterans' Affairs, Subcommittee on Technology Modernization
committees.topic: PACT Act Implementation: Modernizing VA Disability Claims Through Effective Technology
